---
title: "Talks"
author: ""
description: "Talks at different conferences"
listing:
  - id: talks_2025
    contents: "2025/**/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/blog/listing.ejs
    categories: true
page-layout: full
toc-title: Year
toc-location: right
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
code-tools: false
comments: false
freeze: false
---

<style>
#title-block-header .description {
    display: none;
}
</style>
## 2025

:::{#talks_2025}
:::
